title: erodium cicutarium subsp. jacquinianum
intro: Erodium cicutarium subsp. jacquinianum, also known as redstem storksbill, is a perennial plant species within the geranium family. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of redstem storksbill include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing digestive issues such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
